project_type: Next.js 15 App Router with TypeScript + Tailwind CSS, deployed to Cloudflare Pages
test_framework: No test framework configured - this is a static/SSR site with no test suite
build_command: Cannot run npm install or build in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY mode - validate via AST/syntax only
verification_instructions: Since we cannot run npm install or build locally (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network), verification is limited to: 1) Confirming TypeScript syntax is valid, 2) Verifying no imports are broken, 3) Reviewing changes against requirements. The actual build will run on Cloudflare Pages after push.
setup_instructions: N/A - cannot install dependencies in sandbox
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no npm install possible. Code changes must be committed and pushed to main via GitHub power tool. Build validation happens on Cloudflare Pages after push.
contribution_requirements: Commit and push to main branch. Cloudflare auto-deploys from main.
key_patterns: Components use siteConfig from @/lib/site.ts for centralized config. Pages export metadata objects for SEO. Sections are in src/components/sections/. Dark theme with gold accents throughout.
directory_structure: src/app/ has page routes (page.tsx files), src/components/ has reusable components and sections/, src/lib/ has config and data files
